title: rosa × schleicheri var. sublaevis
intro: Rosa × schleicheri var. sublaevis, also known as the Schleicher's rose or wild rose, is a deciduous shrub and a variant of the Rosa × schleicheri species. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa × schleicheri var. sublaevis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
